TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

10:15 A.M. DEPARTMENT #5 JUDGE WICK. BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT DEIBRAH HAYTER. COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL ON 7/14/93 AT 9:00 A.M. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED. PLTF'S. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF'S. EXHIBITS, I.D. AND EVID. THE COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFT. DEIBRAH HAYTER FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 38 MINERVA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FOR FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT TOGETHER WITH A MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE SUM OF $4,057.52 FOR RENT AND DAMAGES AND $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES. COST ARE WAIVED BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYTER, DEIBRAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 38 MINERVA STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $4,057.52 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,807.52, LEASE FORFEITED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT HAYTER, MARK
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $54.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABAD, ANTONIO
